payload.message: Run these commands in /Users/shenlan/workspaces/cloud-neutral-toolkit/knowledge/threads and summarize results briefly: python automation/x_publish.py build-queue && python automation/image_suggester.py suggest

In /Users/shenlan/workspaces/cloud-neutral-toolkit/knowledge/threads, run a safe dry-run first: python automation/x_publish.py publish-today --dry-run . If xurl is authenticated and the user has approved automatic posting, run: X_PUBLISH_CONFIRM=YES python automation/x_publish.py publish-today && python automation/x_publish.py sync-status-to-md . Otherwise report the blocker.
